records.name: Quest OTG clear safety glasses provide eye protection designed to fit comfortably over most prescription eyewear for general jobsite and shop use.
records.shortDescription: Quest OTG clear safety glasses provide eye protection designed to fit comfortably over most prescription eyewear for general jobsite and shop use.
records.description: Quest OTG Clear Safety Glasses are a straightforward over-the-glasses eye protection option for everyday workplace use. Designed to be worn comfortably over most prescription glasses, these safety glasses offer a simple solution for visitors, contractors, and employees who require basic eye protection without removing their personal eyewear. The clear polycarbonate lens provides standard impact protection and full-view coverage for general tasks. A lightweight frame and wraparound profile help maintain comfort during short-term or intermittent use while allowing compatibility with common workplace PPE. The clear lens supports maximum visibility in indoor and low-light environments. Suitable for general industrial, warehouse, maintenance, and shop applications, Quest OTG safety glasses deliver practical, no-frills eye protection where basic compliance and ease of use are the priority.

records.name: QUESTAPE 2 inch Tape, 24 Rolls per Case, 27 Cases per Pallet
records.shortDescription: Versatile polyethylene-coated cloth tape designed for general maintenance, construction, and abatement applications. Conforms well to irregular surfaces and removes cleanly with low residue.
records.description: QUESTAPE® is a general-purpose polyethylene-coated cloth tape designed for a wide range of industrial and contractor applications. It is commonly used in asbestos, lead, and mold abatement, as well as general maintenance and construction environments where dependable adhesion and easy handling are required. The tape conforms well to irregular surfaces and adheres to a broad range of substrates while maintaining a consistent lay-flat application. It tears easily by hand, hangs straight during use, and resists curling and running, helping reduce wasted material. Designed for clean removal, QUESTAPE® releases with low residue from most surfaces. Available in multiple widths to suit different job requirements: 2" width — 24 rolls per case AND 3" width — 16 rolls per case. QUESTAPE® offers reliable performance for everyday industrial taping needs where durability, flexibility, and clean removal are important.

records.name: Quest Protective Apparel smoke safety glasses deliver lightweight, anti-fog eye protection with impact-resistant polycarbonate lenses and wraparound coverage for all-day comfort in industrial, lab, and jobsite environments.
records.shortDescription: Quest Protective Apparel smoke safety glasses deliver lightweight, anti-fog eye protection with impact-resistant polycarbonate lenses and wraparound coverage for all-day comfort in industrial, lab, and jobsite environments.
records.description: Quest Protective Apparel Smoke Safety Glasses are designed to provide clear, reliable eye protection for a wide range of professional and everyday applications. Featuring scratch-resistant polycarbonate smoke lenses with an anti-fog coating, these safety glasses help reduce glare while maintaining clear visibility and protecting against impact, debris, and harmful UV exposure. The wraparound, rimless design offers wide-angle coverage without added bulk, ensuring a secure and comfortable fit during extended wear. Optically correct smoke lenses deliver distortion-free vision, making them suitable for both indoor and outdoor use where light control is beneficial. Lightweight construction enhances comfort for long shifts, while the streamlined profile allows easy integration with other personal protective equipment. Meeting ANSI Z87.1 safety standards, Quest Protective Apparel smoke safety glasses are ideal for construction, manufacturing, laboratory work, shooting ranges, woodworking, automotive tasks, and general jobsite use. Designed for versatility and performance, they deliver dependable eye protection without compromising comfort, fit, or visibility.
